metadata.title: Payments workspace
metadata.description: Track wallet status, payout readiness, and payout lifecycle details.

home.title: Payments
home.description: Review your balance, your payouts, and the main action for this organization.

organization.title: Active organization
organization.label: Switch organization
organization.count: {count, plural, one {# organization available} other {# organizations available}}
organization.help: You are viewing payments for this organization. Switch only when you need another one.
organization.invalidDescription: The selected organization could not be loaded for your account. Choose another organization and retry.

nextStep.requestDescription: {organization} already has available balance. Start the payout when you are ready.
nextStep.queueDescription: Before requesting another payout, review the one already in progress for {organization}.
nextStep.secondaryDescription: Use payout history to review previous requests, open details, and track status changes without losing context.

shell.loadingDescription: We are preparing wallet and payout information for this organization.
shell.emptyDescription: Create or join an organization to start managing payout cycles from this workspace.
shell.degradedDescription: We could not load the latest payments information. Retry to refresh this workspace.

queue.title: Follow-up and next steps
queue.description: Recent payment activity that is worth monitoring or reviewing.
queue.actionNeededDescription: Cases where the organization may need to review information or wait for validation.
queue.inProgressDescription: Cases that are still moving and only need monitoring for now.
queue.emptyInProgress: Nothing is being monitored right now.
queue.genericDescription: There was a recent payments update for this organization.

payoutQueued.title: A payout is waiting to be activated
payoutQueued.description: The payout is queued and will activate when the current flow can continue.

payoutRequested.title: A payout request was created
payoutRequested.description: The platform received your request and prepared it for the next step.

payoutProcessing.title: The payout is in progress
payoutProcessing.description: The request is moving through validation and internal reconciliation.

payoutPaused.title: The payout was paused
payoutPaused.description: The flow stopped temporarily while the payments team reviews additional information.

payoutResumed.title: The payout resumed
payoutResumed.description: The review finished and the payout flow continued.

payoutCompleted.title: The payout completed
payoutCompleted.description: The flow finished and the payout is now closed.

payoutFailed.title: The payout could not complete
payoutFailed.description: The request needs follow-up before a new payout should be attempted.

payoutAdjusted.title: The payout was adjusted
payoutAdjusted.description: The amount or state changed during payout review.

debtPauseRequired.title: Debt paused part of the flow
debtPauseRequired.description: A financial rule introduced a pause and it is worth reviewing before the next payout.

debtResumeAllowed.title: Debt conditions now allow the flow to resume
debtResumeAllowed.description: Financial conditions improved and the flow can continue.

disputeOpened.title: A dispute was opened
disputeOpened.description: There is a payment dispute that may need evidence or follow-up.

subscriptionRenewalFailed.title: Subscription renewal failed
subscriptionRenewalFailed.description: Billing may need attention to avoid interruptions in payment-related tools.

refundExecuted.title: A refund was executed
refundExecuted.description: A refund movement is now part of the financial history.

request.title: Request payout
request.description: Start a new payout without leaving payments. If another payout is already active, you can prepare the next one here.
request.amountHint: Enter the amount in MXN cents or leave the field empty to use the current maximum available amount.
request.submitHint: Submitting creates a payout quote and lifecycle request.
request.queuedHint: If an active payout exists, you can queue this request as the next intent.
request.successDescription: The payout is registered and you can track it from the detail view.
request.queueSuccessDescription: The request is now set aside to run once the current payout finishes.
request.conflictDescription: This organizer already has an active payout lifecycle. Queue a request to run when the current cycle finishes.

errors.invalidAmount: Enter a valid positive amount in MXN cents.
errors.submitFailed: Payout request could not be created right now.
errors.queueRequiresAmount: A valid amount is required to prepare the next payout.
errors.queueFailed: The next payout could not be prepared right now.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.description: Review your payouts and open each one only when you need more detail.
payouts.historyDescription: Review statuses, amounts, and dates without mixing the history with the request form.
payouts.emptyDescription: Once you submit the first payout, it will appear here with its status and request date.

detail.title: Payout detail
detail.description: Review the current status, history, and technical details only when they are needed.
detail.summaryDescription: This card shows the current status and the key amounts for this request.
detail.stateTimelineDescription: Each update explains what happened and when it happened.
detail.noEvents: No lifecycle events are available for this payout request yet.
detail.notFoundDescription: The selected payout request could not be found for this organization.

reasonFamilies.activePayout: Another payout is already in progress
reasonFamilies.processing: The payout is still being processed
reasonFamilies.genericReview: The payments team needs to review this item

events.genericDescription: There was an update in this payout lifecycle.

requested.title: The request was created
requested.description: The platform registered the payout and prepared its lifecycle.

processing.title: The payout entered processing
processing.description: The flow is moving through validation and reconciliation.

paused.title: The payout was paused
paused.description: The platform temporarily stopped the flow while it reviews more information.

resumed.title: The payout resumed
resumed.description: The review finished and the payout flow continued.

completed.title: The payout completed
completed.description: The lifecycle finished successfully and the payout is closed.

failed.title: The payout could not complete
failed.description: The flow ended with an issue and it is worth reviewing before continuing.

adjusted.title: The payout was adjusted
adjusted.description: The amount or payout configuration changed during review.

statement.title: Statement and proof
statement.description: Request the statement after the payout is complete and only reveal the fingerprint when support or verification needs it.
statement.notFound: The statement is not available for this request yet.
statement.notTerminal: The statement will appear once the payout reaches a terminal state.
statement.error: The statement could not be loaded right now.
statement.fingerprintDescription: The fingerprint is mainly useful for support or verification, so it stays hidden by default.
